calendar.description: Review company performance and upcoming Q3 product goals.

calendar.description: Align on social channels and ad budgets.

wiki.title: Office Guest Wi-Fi
wiki.content: To connect to the corporate guest network, select SSID 'XYZ-Guest'. Open your browser and complete the authentication page. The weekly passcode is 'EnterpriseSpeed2026!'.

wiki.title: HR Work-from-Home Policy
wiki.content: All full-time employees are eligible for hybrid scheduling. You may work remotely up to 3 days per week (Tuesdays and Thursdays are designated core in-office days). Ensure your calendar availability is updated.
